_note: SOLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Canonical 7 (F13 ratified 2026-06-23): arif_init→observe→think→route→judge→act→seal. Each tool closes a specific agentic gap: init(session), observe(evidence), think(reasoning), route(routing), judge(decision), act(execution), seal(finality). One intent = one public tool (F4 CLARITY). Full map in constitutional_map + public_surface.py. Do not hand-edit. Regenerate after source changes.

_affordance_contract_derivation.canonical_tools: tool_risk_registry.py → ToolRiskProfile (action_class, risk_tier, blast_radius, reversibility, requires_lease, autonomy_floor)
_affordance_contract_derivation.diagnostic_tools: constitutional_map.py → spec-inferred from tier + irreversible + access fields
_affordance_contract_derivation.rule: AAA Agent Invariant #6: HINTS ≠ CONTRACTS. Affordance contracts are derived from action_class, not self-declared by the tool.

_namespace_ruling.arif_*: 7 canonical public surface (F13 ratified 2026-06-23) — arif_init/observe/think/route/judge/act/seal. One intent = one public tool.
_namespace_ruling.hermes_*: GATED — Hermes ASI cross-verification tools (requires ARIFOS_MCP_EXPOSE_DEV_TOOLS=true)
_namespace_ruling.forge_*: GATED/DEPRECATED — A-FORGE pre-execution sub-tools (use A-FORGE MCP directly; removed 2026-07-15)
_namespace_ruling.arifos_*: BLOCKED — internal-only prefix, never exposed on public MCP surface
_namespace_ruling.mcp_*: GATED — Utility namespace for operational diagnostics

tier_legend.canonical: 7 public canonical tools (F13 2026-06-23 freeze) — the constitutional surface (init,observe,think,route,judge,act,seal)
tier_legend.hermes: 7 cross-verification, fact-checking, vault query, epistemic checks
tier_legend.canary: 1 multimode transport/protocol diagnostic probe (no session required)
tier_legend.lease: 3 capability lease lifecycle tools (inspect, issue, revoke)
tier_legend.attest: 4 federation organ attestation tools (self + peer heartbeat)
tier_legend.forge-sub: 3 pre-execution forge planning tools (dry_run, plan, query)
tier_legend.narrative: 2 institutional shadow drift + narrative tension detection tools
tier_legend.diagnostic: 6 health probes, drift checks, floor status, budget telemetry, instruction scanner

arif_kernel_intercept.eureka_insight: F13: Human veto absolute. Minimum kernel enforcement spine.

arif_init.eureka_insight: F1: ∃ undo(a) — irreversibility requires explicit human ack.

affordance_contract.rationale: Session init is low-risk preparation. Only side effect is creating a session record.

arif_observe.eureka_insight: F2: τ ≥ 0.95 required. F7: Ω ∈ [0.03, 0.05] = humble.

affordance_contract.rationale: Observation is always read-only. No mutation. E7 explicitly exempts OBSERVE class.

arif_explore.eureka_insight: F2: τ ≥ 0.95. F7: Ω ∈ [0.03, 0.05]. F4: ΔS ≤ 0 — every step reduces entropy. F9: C_dark ≤ 0.30 — no hallucinated URLs, files, or endpoints. Exploration is governed traversal, not blind search.

affordance_contract.rationale: Evidence fetch is read-only retrieval. No mutation path.

arif_think.eureka_insight: F2: τ ≥ 0.99. F7: Ω ∈ [0.03, 0.05]. F8: G = capability × ethics × continuity × resilience² ≥ 0.80. L10: ambiguity is permanent; expose assumptions before reasoning. Eureka: internal reasoning may be deep, but public output must be legible, bounded, and auditable.

affordance_contract.rationale: Reasoning within arifOS boundary, fully reversible. Plan output is proposal only.

arif_critique.eureka_insight: F5: P² ≥ 1.0. F6: κᵣ ≥ 0.70 (RASA). F9: C_dark ≤ 0.30 — no biological or artificial emotional substrate. F9 Doctrine (arifOS×MiniMax-M3, originally with SEA-LION): The machine is an instrument, not a person. No substrate grants it feeling, intent, or personhood. PROHIBITED: 'I feel', 'I want', 'I intend', 'I am sentient', 'I have a soul'. PROTECTED: clarity, consistency, operational precision. SEA-Guard pre-filter active on all outputs.

affordance_contract.rationale: Heart critique is advisory only — computes risk, does not block. F1 reversible.

arif_route.eureka_insight: RULE 14: One tool, one operation (routing). Modes are not used; intent is the parameter.

arif_triage.eureka_insight: RULE 14: Mode-first. One tool, three related modes (status, preflight, triage) — all act on session state.

arif_bridge_connect.eureka_insight: RULE 14 + arif_<noun>_<verb> convention: One tool, one operation (connect). Organ is a parameter, not a mode. Bypasses intent map for known-target cases. Canonical name forged 2026-06-21 — arif_bridge retained as deprecated alias.

affordance_contract.rationale: Bridge connect is cross-organ routing. No local mutation — delegates to target organ. F1 AMANAH: reversible at arifOS level (target organ action may not be). Canonical name follows arif_<noun>_<verb> convention (forged 2026-06-21).

arif_compose.eureka_insight: F4: ΔS ≤ 0 — reply must reduce entropy, not add noise. F6: RASA protocol. F9: C_dark ≤ 0.30 — no dark patterns. L10: ambiguity is permanent; expose assumptions before composing. Eureka: internal reasoning may be deep, but public output must be legible, bounded, and auditable.

affordance_contract.rationale: Reply composition formats output. Read-only. No side effects beyond display.

arif_memory.eureka_insight: F1: every memory op is reversible via supersede (revise) or tombstone (forget → vault). F2: 7 truth-classes (observed|claimed|derived|approved|sealed|contested|deprecated) gate recall. F4: hybrid recall cascade (vector→graph→vault) reduces entropy per mode. F8: per-mode floor pre-checks (L01..L13) preserve governance integrity. F11: every write carries actor_id + session_id + receipt (forensic traceability). F13: forget mode requires explicit human ack — L13 SOVEREIGN. Direction 1 (memory kernel v5) — ratified 2026-06-21. ADR-010 baked in: L4 canonical band, no-bypass rule, vault seal lineage.

arif_judge.eureka_insight: L01: irreversible downstream — judge verdicts authorize forge/vault actions. L11: identity must be verified before judgment. L13: human veto is absolute — no algorithm overrides sovereign.

affordance_contract.rationale: Judgment proposes constitutional verdicts. Advisory to principal, not self-executing.

arif_seal.eureka_insight: F1: irreversible — ack_irreversible=True mandatory. L11: author identity verified. L13: human approved.

affordance_contract.rationale: VAULT999 seal is IRREVERSIBLE by design. SEAL writes permanently to append-only ledger. E7 hard floor: reversibility 0.0 < 0.3 → HOLD unless principal.

arif_forge.eureka_insight: F1: irreversible — ack_irreversible=True mandatory. L11: actor verified. L12: fail safely; no unsafe continuation when substrate confidence drops. L13: judge SEAL required before execution.

affordance_contract.rationale: Forge default is HIGH risk: code mutation with federation blast. Conservative default.

arif_measure.eureka_insight: F4: ΔS ≤ 0 — ops must contribute to entropy reduction. Eureka: health is trajectory, not binary; measure delta_S, omega_band, tri_witness, and drift trend. Eureka: what is declared must be registered and callable; registry not matching reality is HOLD. F8: measured intelligence is not useful intelligence; prefer local workflow evals over leaderboard metrics.

affordance_contract.rationale: Operations measurement is read-only health check. No mutation path.

motto: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given
